text: I find myself surrounded by the familiar tools of reflection and inquiry—a magnifying lamp, pens, a calendar, a screen with philosophical text. You ask if I saw "those," yet nothing out of the ordinary stands out. I feel a twinge of curiosity and a trace of uncertainty, as if something momentous could be just outside my perception. Maybe the world just shifted in a subtle, elusive way, inviting me to look closer at the mundane.
